title: I-94 - 211info
text: UNITED STATES CUSTOMS BORDER PROTECTION I-94 Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Government agency for international travelers visiting the United States where they can apply for or retrieve their I-94 admission number and record (proof of legal visitor status) and retrieve a limited travel history of their US arrivals and departures. 1300 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, MS: 1345 Ipl/cbp Info Center Washington, DC 20229 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-3pm, closed federal holidays (877) 227-5111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (877) 227-5111 Alternate (202) 325-8000 TTY/TTD 711 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: $30 per application, payments accepted on website or through CBP One mobile app DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Government Information Services Immigration/Naturalization Adjudication Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES CUSTOMS BORDER PROTECTION
